page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance belonging to the ecs.gn6e family. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 736.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance bundles eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined 256 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. No local storage is included, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is rated as weak, placing in the bottom 25% with a score of 1104.49. Conversely, the stress-ng multi-core CPU performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% with a score of 70674.73, driven by the high density of 96 dedicated cores. Network performance is supported by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density resource allocation tailored for parallel processing workloads. The lack of local storage requires external block storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff. The hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as deep learning training, high-performance computing, large-scale scientific simulations, and parallelized data processing tasks that can leverage the massive GPU array and high multi-core throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for highly parallelized workloads. Powered by 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz, it features 736.0 GB of system memory and eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with a total of 256 GB VRAM. The instance lacks local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows a weak single-core stress-ng score of 1104.49, but a strong multi-core score of 70674.73, reflecting its massive parallel processing capacity. This hardware profile is optimized for deep learning, scientific computing, and GPU-intensive workloads.

tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring eight accelerators and ninety-six dedicated cores for massive parallel processing workloads.

Ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
736 GB of system memory with 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
